resultList.dtldesc: 4 BHK Flat Available for Sale in Swaminarayan Family, Nikol, Ahmedabad. Vaastu friendly, East direction facing, having a large carpet area of 2025 sqft.Property SpecificationsSituated on the 3rd floor of a well-kept 10-storey residential building, this large 4 BHK flat has a spacious carpet area of 2025 sqft. Vaastu compliant and east facing, the flat has been well-designed to provide good natural light and air flow throughout the day, making it a preferred option for families looking for a tranquil and serene living space.The flat is unfurnished, and you have the freedom to design and furnish it as per your choice. It has four nicely proportioned bedrooms and three bathrooms  two attached and one common  with a combination of Indian and Western type toilets. Geyser points are installed in all bathrooms. There are two balconies one abutting the living room and the other abutting a bedroom, both abutting the road and open areas, where you can lounge and view the surroundings.The flat has a living and dining space, a standard kitchen with a platform and sink, and a utility space attached. A store room is added for functionality purposes. The flat further has a piped gas supply and vitrified tile flooring across to ensure easy cleaning and hygiene finish.FacilitiesThe building is equipped with modern facilities such as two lifts, 24-hour water supply from both borewell and municipal sources, 100 power backup, security guard services, and CCTV surveillance. A covered parking space is allotted to the unit for your convenience. Residents can enjoy lifestyle amenities like a gym, clubhouse, garden, and an in-house theatre, offering recreation and fitness without having to leave the premises.LocalityLocated in a good area of Nikol, the property is very well connected with very good connectivity to public transport like buses and autos. It is near major conveniences like schools within 500 meters, hospitals within 200 meters, malls and supermarkets within 500 meters, and nearby banks and ATMs. Kalupur Railway Station is 5 km from the property, and Vastral Metro Station is merely 3 km from the property.
